It mandates that all elements in the List must carry matching static values
It opens the List to accept additions of any custom object structure

It prevents downstream functions from executing list mutations
It tells the system that the collection properties are bound to an index
It specifies a List that can hold Integer or any of its master superclass ancestor layers

questions.question: What separates method overriding from method overloading in Java programming execution?
